creator: colin-ports@heliocat.net
text:
YYYYMMDD:
  AFFECTS: users of sysutils/s6-rc
  AUTHOR: Colin Booth <colin-ports@heliocat.net>

  s6-rc has undergone a major version bump and compatibility is not 
  guaranteed for software with a runtime dependency on 
  libs6rc.so.0.2.0.0. Additionally, s6-rc, s6-rc-init, and 
  s6-rc-update have been moved to bin/ from sbin/ and any calling 
  scripts will need to be updated.
